<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Arch\Expectations; use Pest\Arch\Contracts\ArchExpectation; use Pest\Expectation; /** * @internal */ final class ToBeUsedInNothing { /** * Creates an "ToBeUsedInNothing" expectation. * * @param Expectation<array<int, string>|string> $expectation */ public static function make(Expectation $expectation): ArchExpectation { return ToOnlyBeUsedIn::make($expectation, []); } }
